common.translationDescription: This symbol indicates that content written by sellers has been automatically translated. You can change this setting at any time.

hero.title: Your medical supplies at the best B2B price
hero.subtitle: Compare prices from hundreds of suppliers. Buy directly or find the best external deal.

valueProps.bestPricesDesc: Compare offers from 350+ wholesalers, brands and distributors in one unified catalog.
valueProps.simpleOrdersDesc: Low MOQ, integrated payment and tracked delivery. Access wholesale prices usually reserved for large groups.
valueProps.guaranteedDesc: Every product comes from verified suppliers. 100% CE and FAMHP compliant.

comparison.title: MediKong vs. traditional sourcing
comparison.trad6: No protection in case of errors

howToOrder.title: How to order
howToOrder.step1Desc: Browse the catalog to find the best deals and add them to your cart.
howToOrder.step2Desc: Review your cart, compare direct and external offers, adjust quantities.
howToOrder.step3Desc: Confirm and pay by card, bank transfer or deferred payment (30/60 days).
howToOrder.step4Desc: Shipping within 24-48h. A problem? Guaranteed resolution within 24h.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: MediKong is a B2B marketplace that aggregates offers from over 350 verified medical suppliers. You can buy directly, compare market prices, or be redirected to the most competitive external offers.
faq.a2: All healthcare professionals in Belgium: pharmacies, hospitals, clinics, nursing homes, medical practices, physiotherapists, dentists, purchasing centers and authorized resellers.
faq.a3: Prices are displayed excluding VAT. The applicable VAT is added at checkout based on your status and location.
faq.a4: Orders are shipped within 24-48h from our suppliers' warehouses in Belgium and Europe. Tracking is integrated in your customer area.

cta.title: Find the best deals on thousands of medical references.
cta.subtitle: One place for all your B2B medical purchases.

footer.description: The B2B marketplace for medical supplies in Belgium.
footer.copyright: MediKong {{year}} — B2B platform reserved for healthcare professionals — FAMHP compliance

investBanner.msg1: Invest in MediKong — Tax Shelter 45% — Phase 2 fundraising open
investBanner.msg2: From €1,000 — Tax Shelter 45% from €5,000 — Immediate tax deduction
